Package space.sunqian.fs.object.convert

Class ConvertKit

java.lang.Object
space.sunqian.fs.object.convert.ConvertKit
public class ConvertKit extends Object
Utilities for object conversion.

    Method
    Description
    static <A extends Annotation>
    A
    getAnnotation(@Nonnull Class<A> annotationType, @Nonnull ObjectProperty srcProperty, @Nonnull ObjectProperty dstProperty)
    Returns the annotation for the given type from the source property if it exists, otherwise from the destination property.
    static @Nonnull Option<@Nonnull ConvertOption,@Nonnull DateFormatter>
    getDateFormatterOption(@Nonnull String pattern, @Nonnull ZoneId zoneId)
    Returns a Option of DateFormatter for the given pattern and zone id.

    Returns a Option of DateFormatter for the given DatePattern.

    mergeOptions(@Nonnull Option<?,?> @Nonnull @RetainedParam [] defaultOptions, @Nullable DatePattern datePattern, @Nullable NumPattern numPattern)

  • Method Details

    • getDateFormatterOption

      @Nonnull public static @Nonnull Option<@Nonnull ConvertOption,@Nonnull DateFormatter> getDateFormatterOption(@Nonnull @Nonnull DatePattern datePattern)
      Returns a Option of DateFormatter for the given DatePattern. This method is based on a soft-reference cache (from SimpleCache.ofSoft()), so the same Option instance could be returned for the same pattern and zone id.
      Parameters:
      datePattern - the pattern of the date formatter
      Returns:
      the Option of DateFormatter for the given DatePattern

    • getDateFormatterOption

      @Nonnull public static @Nonnull Option<@Nonnull ConvertOption,@Nonnull DateFormatter> getDateFormatterOption(@Nonnull @Nonnull String pattern, @Nonnull @Nonnull ZoneId zoneId)
      Returns a Option of DateFormatter for the given pattern and zone id. This method is based on a soft-reference cache (from SimpleCache.ofSoft()), so the same Option instance could be returned for the same pattern and zone id.
      Parameters:
      pattern - the pattern of the date formatter
      zoneId - the zone id of the date formatter
      Returns:
      the Option of DateFormatter for the given pattern and zone id

    • getNumFormatterOption

      @Nonnull public static @Nonnull Option<@Nonnull ConvertOption,@Nonnull NumFormatter> getNumFormatterOption(@Nonnull @Nonnull NumPattern numPattern)
      Returns a Option of NumFormatter for the given NumPattern. This method is based on a soft-reference cache (from SimpleCache.ofSoft()), so the same Option instance could be returned for the same pattern.
      Parameters:
      numPattern - the pattern of the number formatter
      Returns:
      the Option of NumFormatter for the given NumPattern

    • getNumFormatterOption

      @Nonnull public static @Nonnull Option<@Nonnull ConvertOption,@Nonnull NumFormatter> getNumFormatterOption(@Nonnull @Nonnull String pattern)
      Returns a Option of NumFormatter for the given pattern. This method is based on a soft-reference cache (from SimpleCache.ofSoft()), so the same Option instance could be returned for the same pattern.
      Parameters:
      pattern - the pattern of the number formatter
      Returns:
      the Option of NumFormatter for the given pattern

    • mergeOptions

      @Nonnull public static @Nonnull Option<?,?> @Nonnull [] mergeOptions(@Nonnull @Nonnull Option<?,?> @Nonnull @RetainedParam [] defaultOptions, @Nullable @Nullable DatePattern datePattern, @Nullable @Nullable NumPattern numPattern)
      Merges the default options with the date formatter and number formatter if they are not null.

      If both date pattern and number pattern are null, the default options are returned. If the date pattern is null, the number formatter is merged with the default options in a new array. If the number pattern is null, the date formatter is merged with the default options in a new array. If both date pattern and number pattern are not null, the date formatter and number formatter are merged with the default options in a new array.

      Parameters:
      defaultOptions - the default options
      datePattern - the date pattern
      numPattern - the number pattern
      Returns:
      the merged options

    • getAnnotation

      @Nullable public static <A extends Annotation> A getAnnotation(@Nonnull @Nonnull Class<A> annotationType, @Nonnull @Nonnull ObjectProperty srcProperty, @Nonnull @Nonnull ObjectProperty dstProperty)
      Returns the annotation for the given type from the source property if it exists, otherwise from the destination property.
      Type Parameters:
      A - the type of the annotation
      Parameters:
      annotationType - the type of the annotation
      srcProperty - the source property
      dstProperty - the destination property
      Returns:
      the annotation for the given type from the source property if it exists, otherwise from the destination property
